flavorText: Mechanists build assistant frames, scout drones, and disciplined automata that extend their reach across the battlefield.

features.description: Assemble a mechanical companion or modular helper frame that scouts, assists, and shares the risk of front-line operations.
You gain always-ready spells focused on motion control, force projection, and engineered utility.
You and your frame coordinate better, letting one unit create openings for the other instead of acting like disconnected pieces.
Your construct chassis becomes more resilient, letting it stay relevant deeper into dangerous encounters.
Your command architecture scales up into true battlefield control through coordinated devices and overlapping automation.

mechanist-companion-frame.summary: Gain a real mechanical partner that expands your board presence and utility.
mechanist-companion-frame.description: Companion Frame should feel like a premium class identity feature, not a cosmetic pet. It scouts, helps, blocks space, and gives the subclass a tangible second body in play.
mechanist-companion-frame.usage: Spend 1 Gadget Charge to command, boost, or redeploy your frame.

mechanist-systems-spells.summary: Your granted spells support force projection, positioning, and machine-minded problem solving.

mechanist-linked-actions.summary: Your turn becomes a coordinated sequence between inventor and frame.
mechanist-linked-actions.usage: Spend 1 Gadget Charge when chaining your action with a frame command.

mechanist-hardened-frame.summary: Your construct becomes sturdy enough to stay meaningful into tougher fights.
mechanist-hardened-frame.effect: Your frame gains durability and keeps acting as a true second body in sustained fights.

mechanist-swarm-directive.summary: Your command net expands from one frame to a full battlefield system.
mechanist-swarm-directive.usage: Spend 2 Gadget Charges to execute synchronized multi-device directives.
